building_extra.name: ATFG AI Platform
building_extra.blurb: Multi-model AI platform I built solo that ~100 paying financial producers run their business on: outreach, client management, and a custom ATS. Private.

building_extra.name: AIOS
building_extra.blurb: 24/7 multi-channel agent operation: a 17-role agent org chart, approval-gated human-in-the-loop, and LiteLLM model routing across providers. Private.

building_extra.name: VBrain
building_extra.blurb: Persistent graph-memory system with typed entity edges and zero-LLM extraction, so agents never lose context across sessions. Private.

building_extra.name: hunter-cv.vercel.app
building_extra.blurb: Interactive AI CV: agentic RAG, an eval harness that grades it on 38 questions, and 6-layer security, all on free tiers under $5/mo.

building_extra.name: VibeBloat
building_extra.blurb: Reads your agent history and compiles every mistake so the same one is never made twice. Zero token cost.

contributing_extra.name: Printing Press Library
contributing_extra.blurb: Authored the Paperclip CLI documentation published in the library: install and auth across Node.js, Hermes, OpenClaw, and Claude Desktop, 40+ command groups, and agent-native usage. Credited on the page as Created by @veltri-23.
